summary: An animated 'First 100 Days' statistics card: a navy background with gold-and-white text that counts up ICE arrest figures (66,463 illegal aliens, 2,288 gang members, 498 murder charges, 1,329 sex offenses) before resolving to a '100 DAYS, Protecting America from THE WORST FIRST' card built from a mosaic of mugshots. It has a music bed and animated text reveals, and contains no footage or characters. On-screen text reads 'ARRESTS 66,463 Illegal Aliens', '3 in 4 arrests were criminal aliens', '2,288 gang members', '498 murder charges or convictions', '1,329 sex offense charges or convictions', 'FIRST 100 DAYS', '100 DAYS Protecting America from THE WORST FIRST', and 'ICE.gov/100Days'.
notable_text: 100 DAYS Protecting America from THE WORST FIRST
